nasb.text: The best of them is like a briar, The most upright like a thorn hedge. The day when you post your watchmen, Your punishment will come. Then their confusion will occur.

esv.text: The best of them is like a brier, the most upright of them a thorn hedge. The day of your watchmen, of your punishment, has come; now their confusion is at hand.

cnv.text: 他們中最好的，也不過像荊棘， 最正直的，也不過是有刺的籬笆。 你的守望者所預言的日子， 和你被鑒察的時候，已經來到； 現在他們必要慌亂不安。

ccb.text: 他们当中最好的不过是蒺藜， 最正直的也不过是荆棘篱笆。 你们的守望者所说的日子， 就是你们受惩罚的日子已经来到。 你们必惊慌失措。
